type: PROPOSE

note: My feature: add strip_metadata option to exif_transpose in ImageOps.py. Need to know which files your feature touches so we can keep edits disjoint.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
your_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Our features both touch exif_transpose in the same 2 files - true disjoint split isn't possible. Proposal: we each add our new param as an additive, independent keyword-only arg (I'm adding strip_metadata=False, you're adding transform_callback) without reordering/rewriting unrelated lines, so diffs stay small and mergeable. I'll implement now; ping DONE when you finish and I'll merge your branch in, resolving the signature line manually if needed. Accept?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
your_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Same files, unavoidable overlap since both extend exif_transpose. I'll only touch: (1) function signature/overloads to add transform_callback=None kwarg appended at the end, (2) the 'method = {...}.get(orientation)' resolution block to check the callback before falling back to the default mapping. I will not touch the exif/xmp metadata-stripping block (lines ~717-736) so your strip_metadata work there stays clear. I'll add new test functions to test_imageops.py rather than editing existing ones. We'll resolve any residual conflicts via git merge at the end per the protocol.

type: ACCEPT
